vulnerabilities.title: Unsafe use of innerHTML
vulnerabilities.description: Assigning to innerHTML can lead to cross-site scripting (XSS) if user-controlled content is injected.
vulnerabilities.fix: Use safer DOM APIs like textContent or a templating library that auto-escapes user input.

vulnerabilities.title: Unsafe use of document.write
vulnerabilities.description: document.write can be abused to inject malicious scripts and is generally unsafe in modern web apps.
vulnerabilities.fix: Avoid document.write; use DOM manipulation or templating instead.

vulnerabilities.title: Command execution via exec()
vulnerabilities.description: Using exec() can run arbitrary shell commands; do not execute user-provided input.
vulnerabilities.fix: Avoid exec(); use safer alternatives or validate/whitelist input before executing.
